notes: Live orderEditAddCustomItem validation capture against one disposable CAD order-edit session. The precondition order is resolved via a real cold OrdersOrderEditHydrate forward (single upstreamCall) rather than a seed/setup block. Invalid branches do not stage a line item; the happy path is captured last and the source order is cancelled in cleanup.
